channel.title: Noticias Forex — Global Investing
channel.description: Noticias forex de alto impacto en tiempo real con análisis fundamental para las 8 divisas G8.

item.title: Dollar and Precious Metals Slump on Hawkish Central Banks
item.description: The dollar index (DXY00 ) on Thursday fell by -0.75%. The dollar was under pressure Thursday after the British pound, the euro, and the Japanese yen all rallied following hawkish comments from the BOE, ECB, and BOJ on the inflationary effects of soaring energy prices from the war in Iran.... Fuente: Nasdaq FX

item.title: EUR/USD surges over 1% as ECB rate hike talk hits USD
item.description: EUR/USD reverses course and rises by more than 1.16% after the European Central Bank (ECB) held rates unchanged, while a leaked source revealed that policymakers are ready to discuss rate hikes as soon as April. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: Gold falls on rising yields; tentative rebound seen toward $4,800
item.description: Gold drops on higher-for-longer repricing; technical bounce seen as corrective. Summary: Gold fell as Middle East tensions pushed oil higher and lifted inflation fears Higher-for-longer rate expectations drove yields and the US dollar up Rising real yields pressured gold despite geopolitical risks Profit-taking amplified the move after a strong pri... Fuente: InvestingLive

item.title: Another chaotic post-FOMC session – North American Session Market Wrap for March 19
item.description: March 19th 2026 North-American Session Recap – Markets took a totally different direction after yesterday's FOMC and recent announcements. Check up the latest trends and developments, daily asset and FX performance, what changed fundamentally and what's coming up in the session ahead. Fuente: MarketPulse

item.title: investingLive Americas market news wrap: Big market moves in oil, gold and FX
item.description: Trump: He thought impact of Iran would be worse, will be over with soon Netanyahu: Won't put a stopwatch, but it will end much sooner than people think BOE leaves bank rate unchanged at 3.75% in March meeting decision ECB leaves rates unchanged as expected US initial jobless claims 205K versus 215K estimate US new-home sales for January 0.587 milli... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: NZD/USD rallies despite weak New Zealand GDP and Fed hawkish hold
item.description: The NZD/USD pair surges to the 0.5870 level, up 1.30% on Thursday amid broad weakness of the US Dollar (USD) despite the Federal Reserve (Fed) holding decision the previous day and weak economic data in New Zealand . Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: Economic and event calendar in Asia 20 March 2026 - PBoC Loan Prime Rate (LPR) setting
item.description: The People's Bank of China rate setting is a non-event. China's main policy rate is now the reverse repo rate, currently at 1.4% for the 7-day. The 7-day rate serves as a key policy benchmark, influencing other lending rates like the Loan Prime Rates (LPRs). The PBOC uses these open market operations to inject or absorb funds, influencing interbank... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: S&P and NASDAQ erase declines in trading positive territory
item.description: Comments from Israel PM Netanyahu are helping to reverse the trends in oil and stocks and ease some of the wall of worry. Netanyahu is making amends for the bombing of South Pars field yesterday. In retaliation, Iran targeted Qatar’s energy infrastructure—specifically the Ras Laffan Industrial City, which is one of the world’s largest liquefied nat... Fuente: InvestingLive

item.title: The US Dollar dives after the FOMC, long-term reversal incoming? – Dollar Index (DXY) outlook
item.description: US Dollar (DXY) update: The Petrodollar rally stalls at the top of its July 2025 range as Jerome Powell pushes against further rate hikes during the FOMC meeting. With the Greenback tumbling and its correlation to sideways WTI Crude weakening, a large correction looms. Explore an in-depth technical analysis of the currency. Fuente: MarketPulse

item.title: Forex Today: US Dollar Index drops below 100 after central banks hold rates
item.description: The US Dollar Index (DXY) fell below the 100 mark and is now trading near the 99.40 price zone after investors assessed the Fed’s interest rate decision. Chair Jerome Powell claimed on Wednesday that higher energy prices will likely lead to inflation. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: AUD/USD Price Forecast: Aussie turns bullish above the 50-day SMA, eyes 0.7100
item.description: AUD/USD advances some 0.47% on Thursday as the US Dollar (USD) weakens, despite traders delaying Federal Reserve (Fed) rate cuts, while US Crude Oil prices are edging lower by 4.21%, a headwind for the buck. The pair hovers around 0.7050 at the time of writing. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: Gold crashes below $4,600 as US yields spike, Fed cut bets delayed until 2027
item.description: Gold (XAU/USD) retreats more than 4.5% on Thursday as US Treasury yields rise amid investor concerns about high energy prices, while a solid US jobs report prompted traders to price out a rate cut in 2026, with expectations of the first move in 2027. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: Copper miners are pricing in a rising chance of recession today
item.description: What's the diagnosis of Dr. Copper? It's not a good one at the moment as the industrial metal sinks today. The price action in copper and other assets today suggests a shift away from an inflationary price shock and towards the risk of central banks raising rates and causing a global recession, or at least contributing to one. The strikes on Middle... Fuente: InvestingLive

item.title: Dow Jones Industrial Average drops again as Iran war bogs down equity markets
item.description: The Dow Jones Industrial Average (DJIA) extended losses on Thursday, falling below 46,000 as a renewed spike in Crude Oil prices deepened concerns about stagflation in the US economy. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: NZD/USD rises as weaker US Dollar offsets disappointing New Zealand GDP
item.description: NZD/USD trades around 0.5840 on Thursday, up 0.73% on the day, rebounding after the previous day’s decline. The pair largely shrugs off disappointing GDP data from New Zealand, instead benefiting from a weaker US Dollar (USD). Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: Australian Dollar Price Forecast: Some consolidation likely before a move to 0.7200?
item.description: For the time being, the near-term prospect for the Australian Dollar (AUD) remains positive, supported by consistently high inflation in Australia and the RBA's hawkish stance. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: ECB officials see the possibility of rate hikes at the April meeting, June more likely
item.description: The ECB sources reports are starting to cross and this one is hawkish: Discussion over possible rate hikes may need to start in April, unless there is a quick resolution in the Middle East conflict April likely too early for a hike, June more likely Governors consider baseline projections already outdated EUR/USD challenged the highs of the day on ... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: GBPUSD surges on hawkish BOE: all eyes on the 1.3395 breakout level
item.description: The GBPUSD is racing to the upside with the price up nearly 1% on the day. Today it was the Bank of England's turn. Yesterday was the Fed's turn, and each central bank led to buying in their respective currencies. Yesterday the USD benefited. Today the GBP is benefiting. In summary, the Bank of England left its Bank Rate unchanged at 3.75% in its M... Fuente: InvestingLive

item.title: USD/JPY drops even as Fed holds hawkish tone
item.description: USD/JPY fell to 158.40 on Thursday as investors assessed both nations' central bank decisions. On the one hand, there was the Federal Reserve's (Fed) decision to hold rates steady, with Chair Jerome Powell claiming that higher energy prices will push up overall inflation. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: EUR/USD advances as ECB holds rates steady, USD eases from post-Fed highs
item.description: EUR/USD edges higher on Thursday as the Euro (EUR) strengthens following the European Central Bank’s (ECB) monetary policy decision, while the US Dollar (USD) weakens broadly after a series of central bank decisions, with both the Bank of Japan (BoJ) and the Bank of England (BoE) delivering hawkish Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: ECB scenarios highlight a disasterous inflation scenario if 60% of Hormuz flows blocked
item.description: ECB President Christine Lagarde earlier highlighted ECB March staff projections and the baseline showed growth revised down to 0.9% for 2026, headline inflation revised up to 2.6% on the back of the energy shock. But the baseline isn't where the most important information lies. The alternative scenarios were just released and offer some insight on ... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: ECB: Higher energy risks bring hikes closer – Nordea
item.description: Nordea’s Chief Analyst Jan von Gerich says the European Central Bank (ECB) kept rates unchanged but signalled greater readiness to tighten if higher energy prices feed into broader inflation. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: BoE: Hawkish hold under energy shock – Rabobank
item.description: Rabobank’s Senior Macro Strategist Stefan Koopman notes that the Bank of England (BoE) kept Bank Rate at 3.75% but adopted a distinctly hawkish tone as a renewed energy shock lifts inflation projections. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: EURUSD stalls at key resistance after ECB: breakout or reversal ahead?
item.description: The EURUSD pushed higher following the rate decision and Lagarde’s press conference, but the upside momentum has remained contained, suggesting buyers are still cautious at higher levels. From a fundamental perspective, Lagarde reinforced that inflation remains the primary concern, with risks tilted to the upside—largely driven by energy prices, wh... Fuente: InvestingLive

item.title: GBP: BoE hawkish turn tempers Pound – TD Securities
item.description: TD Securities strategists note that a more hawkish Bank of England (BoE), including removal of its easing bias and discussion of potential hikes, produced only modest Pound (GBP) gains versus the Dollar (USD). Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: ECB Press Conference: Lagarde speaks on policy outlook after leaving key rates unchanged
item.description: Christine Lagarde, President of the European Central Bank (ECB), explains the ECB's decision to leave key rates unchanged at the March policy meeting and responds to questions from the press. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: Yen Rallies on BoJ Hawkish Signal as USD/JPY Rejected at 160 Intervention Red Line
item.description: Central bank marathon ends with rate decisions from SNB, BoE, and ECB now behind market. Yen emerged as the strongest performer, supported by a hawkish interpretation of BoJ Governor Ueda’s post-meeting remarks. While the BoJ held rates at 0.75%, Ueda signaled that rate hikes remain on the table even if growth weakens, as long as […] The post... Fuente: ActionForex

item.title: GBP/JPY declines as BoE hawkish hold fails to offset Yen strength
item.description: GBP/JPY trades with a downside bias on Thursday as the Japanese Yen (JPY) strengthens broadly following the Bank of Japan’s (BoJ) monetary policy decision, while the British Pound (GBP) struggles to gain ground against the Yen despite showing relative strength against other major currencies after th Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: Bank of England leaves interest rates unchanged as war and rising energy prices complicate inflation fight
item.description: The Bank of England kept rates unchanged at 3.75% as war in the Middle East and rising energy prices cloud the inflation outlook and complicate the path for UK monetary policy. Fuente: MarketPulse

item.title: BoE unanimous rate hold surprises as doves abandon cut calls amid energy shock
item.description: Bank of England left Bank Rate unchanged at 3.75%, but the unanimous vote came as a clear surprise. Markets had expected a 6–3 or 7–2 split, with several known doves continuing to push for rate cuts. Instead, even the most dovish members backed a hold, signaling a sharp shift in near-term policy thinking as the […] The post BoE unanimous rate... Fuente: ActionForex
